item.title: 27226551105_bc9503c92b_b
item.dc:creator: admin
item.excerpt:encoded: Water Projects, Mozambique. Ressano Garcia, the main border post with South Africa and transit town which has expanded beyond the coping of the current water supply. Although there is piped water many in the outskirts have still to collect water from the Incomati River. The site of a proposed submersible weir of between 5 - 10m. A simplified process due to there being no affected population. It is also where the Incomati River enters Mozambique from South Africa and the main railway line from South Africa crosses the border. Photograph : John Hogg

item.title: Umbeluzi
item.dc:creator: admin
item.excerpt:encoded: Jornada de campo – demonstração de técnicas de combate á Mosca da Fruta

item.title: Biologist scientist african woman researcher taking genetic solution from test tube
item.dc:creator: admin
item.excerpt:encoded: Biologist scientist african woman researcher taking genetic solution from test tube with micropipette putting in petri dish analyzing gmo of sapling working in biological laboratory.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
